title: After the All Comers: Win and Run Wild

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser puts on a magnificent race
and beats Twin Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we're discussing how Twin Turbo was a tough
opponent with a strong determination to win...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We suddenly spot her weeping and running off in
the opposite direction from the academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser manages to catch her, and
the two happily return to campus.
